field_reviews.paper_evidence: We widen this hourglass by proposing a multi-level back-end which accepts, preserves, and exploits domain-specific information to target innovative hardware.
field_reviews.reason: 对论文目标的概括基本准确，抓住了打破传统 backend hourglass、采用 progressive lowering 面向 RISC-V 扩展生成代码的主旨。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: Even though widely-adopted compilers (e.g., LLVM, GCC) offer tuned backends, their CPU-focused input abstraction, unstructured intermediate representation (IR), and general-purpose best-effort design inhibit tailored code generation for innovative hardware.
field_reviews.reason: 重要性表述总体成立，但“实现了从高级 DSL 到 Snitch 加速器的端到端自动编译，FPU 利用率最高达 90%，为……提供了新范式”略带总结性拔高；论文更保守地说是 prototype showcases a progressive methodology。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 改为更保守表述：说明其展示了在 MLIR 中以多层 SSA IR 支撑 Snitch 扩展代码生成，并在代表性 ML kernel 上达到最高 90% FPU 利用率。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: Our contributions are: • A low-level representation of the RISC-V ISA and Snitch accelerator extensions in a collection of SSA-based IRs (Sections 3.1 and 3.2). • A multi-level and spill-free register allocator for structured backend IRs (Section 3.3). • A progressive lowering from a high-level DSL down to the aforementioned RISC-V SSA-based IRs (Section 3.4). • An evaluation demonstrating peak performance for handwritten micro-kernels (up to 95% floating-point unit (FPU) utilization), and close-to-matching performance ... for a high-level linear algebra DSL, when targeted via a micro-kernel compiler (Section 4).
field_reviews.reason: 四项贡献点与论文贡献列表基本一致，但第 4 条 evidence 在 dossier 中截断了原句，未保持直接英文引文的完整性。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保留四项贡献点，但将第 4 条 evidence 改为论文中可直接匹配的完整英文引文。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: Our MLIR-based prototype showcases a progressive methodology for creating modular and expressive compiler backends that combine domain knowledge with hardware capabilities.
field_reviews.reason: 论文核心是编译器后端与多层 IR 设计，主主题映射到 Compiler / tensor IR / operator generation 合理。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We implement our idea as a backend for Snitch [80], a scalable in-order RISC-V core with custom extensions for streaming registers and hardware loops.
field_reviews.reason: 次主题映射到 RISC-V custom ISA / open ISA AI extension 合理，因为目标平台是带自定义扩展的 RISC-V Snitch。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We implement our idea as a backend for Snitch [80], a scalable in-order RISC-V core with custom extensions for streaming registers and hardware loops.
field_reviews.reason: 主工作内容集中于 RISC-V ISA 扩展与编译/算子生成，更贴合工作流 2。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We demonstrate this concept by implementing a custom backend for a RISC-V-based accelerator with hardware loops and streaming registers
field_reviews.reason: 该文是面向 RISC-V 自定义扩展的编译器后端，不是直接提出 CPU 矩阵扩展本体，因此不应算作 CUTE 的直接 baseline。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We pair base IRs modelling the core instruction set architecture (ISA) (e.g., RISC-V) with structured IRs for domain-specific accelerator extensions. ... demonstrate that spilling common in best-effort register allocation is not needed for peak performance.
field_reviews.reason: 技术路线概括基本忠实，涵盖多层方言、渐进 lowering、Snitch 扩展建模与无 spill 寄存器分配。个别细节如“三遍线性扫描”若非直接来自文本则属于轻度推断。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 删除未经直接证实的实现细节，保留多层 IR、渐进 lowering、增量寄存器分配、SSR/FREP 建模等已被文本支持的内容。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: The combination of high- and low-level passes yields nearly optimal performance when compiling linear algebra micro-kernels using our compiler, reaching 73%-90% FPU utilization across our kernels.
field_reviews.reason: 结果总结大体正确，数值多数可在正文找到；但“传统 LLVM 后端的 Clang 和 MLIR 流水线仅达约 42%”需要更谨慎表述为特定对比流在相关实验中的结果，而非普遍结论。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保留 73%-90%、95%、1.80 FLOPs/cycle、11/20 与 12/15 等结果；把 42% 明确写成对比流程在论文实验中的近似观测值。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: excluding Softmax and Sigmoid, as these rely on exponentiation and logarithm functions, the implementation of which is beyond the scope of this paper. These trends should be taken into account by higher-level tools calling into our compiler when distributing larger workloads between Snitch cores.
field_reviews.reason: 三条 gap 的方向基本合理，但前两条 evidence 不是严格逐字匹配；另外第一条把“更深层嵌套循环下可能成为问题”扩展成了较强的结论，需要更保守。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 将前两条 evidence 改为论文中可直接提取的原文；第一条 gap 改写为论文明确承认的潜在寄存器压力约束，而非已证实缺陷。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first MLIR-based compiler backend that captures accelerator-specific abstractions and employs a self-contained code generation scheme.
field_reviews.reason: 该字段基本有据可依，但“代表最新水平”属于外延性评价，应弱化为“可视为该方向的重要近期代表工作”。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保留 first-MLIR-based-backend 这一作者自述，弱化“最新水平/前沿代表”的绝对化措辞。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: Even though widely-adopted compilers (e.g., LLVM, GCC) offer tuned backends, their CPU-focused input abstraction, unstructured intermediate representation (IR), and general-purpose best-effort design inhibit tailored code generation for innovative hardware.
field_reviews.reason: 该字段总体被支持，且 42% vs 90% 等数值来自论文实验。不过“证明了必要性”略强，宜表述为“支持/表明了必要性”。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 将绝对结论改为保守判断，并保留论文已展示的对比结果与范围边界。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: The Streams optimization enables the use of Snitch SSRs, resulting in a 50% decrease in the cycle count. Meanwhile, the number of explicit loads and stores issued decreases by 66%... Adding Scalar Replacement leads to an additional performance improvement of over 4× ... The combination of high- and low-level passes yields nearly optimal performance ... reaching 73%-90% FPU utilization across our kernels.
field_reviews.reason: 该字段大体受到实验结果支持，但“20 个 FP 寄存器和 15 个整数寄存器即可满足 MatMul 等核心算子需求”需要更精确地表述为论文报告的已分配寄存器使用量，而不是资源充足性的普遍结论。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 改写为：论文在给定 Snitch 寄存器资源下观察到 MatMul/MatMulT 等内核使用到 8/20 或 11/20 FP、8/15 或 12/15 integer registers，显示该方法在实验内核上可实现无 spill 编译。

issues.paper_evidence: An evaluation demonstrating peak performance for hand-written micro-kernels (up to 95% floating-point unit (FPU) utilization), and close-to-matching performance
issues.problem: 原 evidence 不是论文中的完整直接引文，末尾拼接成摘要式句子，违反 evidence 必须为英文原文直引的要求。
issues.recommended_action: 改成论文可直接匹配的完整原句片段，避免自行补写。

issues.paper_evidence: CGO '25: Proceedings of the 23rd ACM/IEEE International Symposium on Code Generation and Optimization (March 2025)
issues.problem: venue 与源 paper JSON 的元数据不一致；dossier 写成长标题，源 paper JSON 记录为 `CGO`。
issues.recommended_action: 按源 paper JSON 统一为 `CGO`。

issues.paper_evidence: 信息不足，无法从文本中提取
issues.problem: 该 evidence 不是对源文本的逐字直引，且现有 draft 文本难以完整恢复 dossier 中的组合引文。
issues.recommended_action: 改为可从论文直接提取的保守引文，或在无法确保逐字匹配时缩短为明确可见的原句片段。

issues.paper_evidence: excluding Softmax and Sigmoid, as these rely on exponentiation and logarithm functions, the implementation of which is beyond the scope of this paper.
issues.problem: 原 evidence 与论文原文存在标点和断词差异，不满足严格直引要求。
issues.recommended_action: 替换为上述可直接匹配的英文原文。

review_target.analysis_title: A Multi-level Compiler Backend for Accelerated Micro-kernels Targeting RISC-V ISA Extensions
review_target.paper_title: A Multi-level Compiler Backend for Accelerated Micro-kernels Targeting RISC-V ISA Extensions

summary: 该 dossier 与论文主题、方法和主要数值结果大体一致，但存在多处 evidence 直引不规范，且个别 proposal 结论和 significance 表述偏强。元数据中的 venue 也未与源 paper JSON 保持一致。整体可修复，但在修正证据引文和收敛措辞前，不宜直接用于 proposal。
